name: Crab Romanoff
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Cayenne pepper or red pepper flakes
2 to 3 dashes Mushrooms, drained (4 oz can)
recipeInstructions: Remove all cartilage from the crabmeat. In a large bowl, mix rice, sour cream, cottage cheese, and seasonings. Add mushrooms and crabmeat: mix gently but thoroughly. Transfer mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole. Sprinkle cheese, then paprika over top. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until hot and bubbly, about 20 minutes.
